message:
feat(security): add sealed trait pattern to FcpConnector hierarchy [MOR/C3.6]

Add private::Sealed supertrait to FcpConnector preventing unauthorized
external implementations. All archetype traits (RequestResponse,
Streaming, Bidirectional, Polling, Webhook) inherit Sealed through
FcpConnector.

Changes:
- sealed module with Sealed trait in fcp-core/src/connector.rs
- impl_fcp_sealed! convenience macro for connector authors
- Sealed re-exported through fcp-kernel and fcp-sdk
- BaseConnector implements Sealed
- ~140 connector and test types sealed via impl_fcp_sealed!
- 6 sealed trait acceptance tests
- Scaffold template (fwc new) includes sealed impl
- Fix pre-existing verify() by-ref errors in 6 connectors

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
